notes:
I set "PROTON_LOG=1 PROTON_DUMP_DEBUG_COMMANDS=1 %command%" as launch options and started the game from the script /tmp/proton_<user>/run without modifications.
Relevant parameters taken directly from the script are:
WINEDLLOVERRIDES="d3d11=n;d3d10=n;d3d10core=n;d3d10_1=n;dxgi=n"
WINEESYNC="1"
The game slows down a bit when enemies hit you, but I was able to complete it with only one crash.
title: Bye-Bye, Wacky Planet
